text:
Hello guys, good night, the exact same problem happened to me.


Motherboard Asus b85m-r r2.0
Processor: Core I7 (I think 10 generation)
SSD 240GB WD Green (Installed TrueNAS)
5 HDD 1TB WD Blue (RAID I don't remember which one I put but I know it has a RAID)

I do not know if this problem can still be reviewed, in advance thank you very much for the time of the thread.

Greetings! :D
